title: Gomphandra vitiensis

This family is part of the larger group of plants known as the angiosperms, which is the most diverse group of land plants. The Stemonuraceae family is native to tropical regions and is primarily found in Southeast Asia, with some species also found in the Pacific Islands. The classification of Gomphandra vitiensis is also reflected in its binomial nomenclature, which is used to identify and distinguish different plant species.
